disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are globally disabled. Offers will not be shown for any touchpoint whose name appears in this list, regardless of other configuration.

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint names that are globally disabled. Offers triggered via a sub-touchpoint whose name appears here will be suppressed.

touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint configurations. Each entry defines which offers to show, and under what conditions, when the app triggers a specific touchpoint.

names.description: Additional touchpoint names that share this same offer configuration. Allows a single configuration entry to apply to multiple touchpoint identifiers.

name.description: The identifier of a single touchpoint. Used to match the touchpoint when looking up offer configuration for a specific trigger location in the app.

info.description: List of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines the screens, session tracking, and launch conditions for one offer variant at this touchpoint.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier of the thank-you popup to display after a successful subscription purchase at this touchpoint.

launch_logic.description: List of condition sets that determine when this offer is eligible to be shown. Each item is evaluated independently; the offer is shown if any one item passes all its conditions.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with an interstitial ad at this touchpoint. The offer is shown only if an interstitial ad is available.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with a rewarded ad that grants the user credits. The offer is shown only if the relevant rewarded ad is available.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days elapsed since the app was installed required for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no lower bound.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of times the user has completed an editor session (e.g. exported or saved a project) required for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no lower bound.

app_session_end.description: Maximum total app session count (exclusive) allowed for this rule to pass. Use -1 to indicate no upper bound.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum number of completed editor sessions (exclusive) allowed for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum number of times this offer has previously been shown (tracked per touchpoint+screens key) required for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no lower bound.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package IDs. When non-empty, this rule passes only if the user's purchase history contains at least one of the listed package IDs. Empty list means no package history requirement.

user_had_subscription.description: When true, this rule passes only for users who have previously had any subscription. When false, passes only for users who have never had a subscription. When null/absent, no restriction is applied.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with a rewarded interstitial ad. The offer is shown only if that ad format is currently available.

key_session_start.description: Minimum count of sessions tracked under the parent offer's session_key required for this rule to pass. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. Use -1 for no lower bound.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days elapsed since the app was installed (exclusive) allowed for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: When true, this rule applies only when the app is operating in AI credits flow. When false, applies only when not in credits flow. When null/absent, no restriction is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier forwarded to the offer screen for this specific launch logic rule. Newer field name equivalent to offer_screen_touch_point.

repeat_key_session.description: When set, the offer is eligible periodically based on the key session count modulo (repeat_key_session + 1). Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. Use -1 to disable.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage (inclusive) required for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no lower bound.

is_store_available.description: When true, this rule passes only when Google Play Store is among the active payment methods. When false, passes only when it is not available.

key_session_end.description: Maximum count of sessions tracked under the parent offer's session_key (exclusive) allowed for this rule to pass. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. Use -1 for no upper bound.

repeat_session.description: When set, the offer is eligible only when the total app session count is an exact multiple of this value. Use -1 to disable repeat-session gating.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Touchpoint identifier forwarded to the offer screen for this specific launch logic rule. Legacy field name — prefer offer_screen_touchpoint. Both fields serve the same purpose.

restricted_packages.description: List of package/offer ID pairs that gate this rule on promotional offer eligibility. When non-empty, the rule passes only if the user is eligible for a promotional offer for every entry in the list. Empty or absent means no eligibility restriction.

package_id.description: Subscription package ID used to check whether the user is eligible for a promotional offer. The rule passes only if the user qualifies for the promotional offer identified by the accompanying offer_id.

offer_id.description: Promotional offer ID associated with the package_id. The rule passes only if the user is eligible for this specific promotional offer on the given package.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type identifiers the user must currently be on for this rule to apply. The special value 'free' targets non-subscribed users. When empty, no tier restriction is applied.

app_session_start.description: Minimum total app session count (inclusive) required for this rule to pass. Use -1 to indicate no lower bound.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times this offer may be shown within a single day (tracked per touchpoint+screens key). Use -1 to disable the daily limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with a rewarded ad at this touchpoint. The offer is shown only if a rewarded ad is currently available.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, this offer is skipped if the app is currently within the one-day-pass cooldown period. When false or absent, the cooldown period does not affect offer eligibility.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum number of times this offer has previously been shown (exclusive, tracked per touchpoint+screens key) allowed for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum device storage usage percentage (exclusive) allowed for this rule to pass. Use -1 for no upper bound.

offer_variant.description: Identifier for the offer presentation variant. Used to select a specific UI or content variant for the offer screen, for example for A/B testing purposes.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Combined with the touchpoint name to form a unique key for tracking per-offer session and daily counts.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier forwarded to the offer screen when it is opened. Newer field name equivalent to offer_screen_touch_point. Both fields serve the same purpose.

session_key.description: A shared key used to track session counts independently of the touchpoint. Allows multiple touchpoints to share the same session counter. Used by key_session_start, key_session_end, and repeat_key_session checks. Empty string means no shared key tracking.

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, this offer is shown to the user only once. After it has been displayed, it will not be shown again at this touchpoint.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Touchpoint identifier forwarded to the offer screen when it is opened. Legacy field name — prefer offer_screen_touchpoint. Both fields serve the same purpose.
